prompt: A cinematic, wide-angle shot of an ancient forest where massive, moss-covered tree trunks stand on the left, glowing with faint bioluminescence. Moving to the right, the trees physically dissolve into wisps of dark smoke and fluttering charcoal ash, vanishing into a deep black void. High textural detail, moody and somber atmosphere, blurry motion effect on the disappearing fragments. No text, no graphs. 16:9 aspect ratio.
insight: The world has lost 178 million hectares of forest since 1990, an irreversible evaporation of Earth's primary ecosystems.
